| `div` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd \leftarrow rs1 \div rs2$ (enters) | *Divide* | R |
| `divu` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd \leftarrow rs1 \div rs2$ (naturals) | *Divide Unsigned* | R |
| `rem` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd \leftarrow rs1 \bmod rs2$ (enters) | *Remainder* | R |
| `remu` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd \leftarrow rs1 \bmod rs2$ (naturals) | *Remainder Unsigned* | R |
